title: Rename device - new name on the FMD disconnected card
scenario: Renamed device name does not persist on the disconnected card in the Find My Device screen after disconnecting
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
3. In Device Settings, tap on the device name field and rename the device to a new name (e.g., "My Poly Headset").
4. Confirm the rename and return to the Home screen.
5. Disconnect the device by pressing the Power button on the device or using the app's disconnect option.
6. Navigate to the Find My Device (FMD) screen from the Home screen or menu.
7. Observe the disconnected device card on the FMD screen.
expected: The disconnected device card on the Find My Device screen displays the new device name (e.g., "My Poly Headset") that was set in Device Settings.
